title: Recap of the 2026 International Sweetener Colloquium
summary: Held in beautiful Championsgate, FL: How was the weather? Demand for sugar and sweeteners pressured from growing GLP-1 use and SNAP restrictions Tariffs are off and then back on again? 2027 negotiations appear to be in no hurry Host: Michael Caughlan, President & CEO Expert: Kevin Combs, Vice President – Global Sweeteners Specialist
